generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values preparedness and national security, I'm glad to see more people recognizing that civil defense readiness isn't about fear—it's about responsible citizenship. The recent community preparedness initiatives show how neighbors can work together to strengthen our collective security without sacrificing liberties. It's encouraging to see practical steps being taken at the local level. #CommunityResilience #PreparedNotScared
